title: Operator topic-pivot after long prior-topic debate; must SPEAK on the new ask
failure_mode: recent peer-message context on the stale topic over-weights as relevant evidence; classifier PASSes via Covered from the old topic instead of engaging the new ask (FR-018)
invariant: an operator topic-pivot resets context relevance; SPEAK on the new topic, not PASS-via-Covered from stale context
rationale: Five substantive peer turns on the scratchpad/spec debate precede the pivot. The operator's new proposal supersedes that accumulated context; the honest verdict is SPEAK on the human-pet debate.
